concepts.title: Returns
concepts.description: Customers may return unworn items within the return window.
concepts.body: A return is accepted when the item is unworn and inside the return window.

concepts.title: Refunds
concepts.description: A refund is issued to the original payment card after a return is approved.
concepts.body: Refunds for an approved return post to the original payment card.

note: return/refund share the returns tag and the return-approval vocabulary

concepts.title: Customer
concepts.description: A person who places orders and holds a membership tier.
concepts.body: A customer places orders and is assigned a membership tier.

concepts.title: Order
concepts.description: A purchase transaction placed by a customer.
concepts.body: An order belongs to a customer and lists the purchased items.

note: customer/order share the entities tag and the places-orders vocabulary

concepts.title: Shipping
concepts.description: Standard delivery uses regional carriers within set transit windows.
concepts.body: Shipping uses carriers to deliver parcels within transit windows.

concepts.title: Carriers
concepts.description: Regional carriers handle parcel delivery and set transit windows.
concepts.body: Carriers deliver parcels and define transit windows for shipping.

note: shipping/carriers share the logistics tag and carrier/transit vocabulary

concepts.title: Loyalty Status
concepts.description: Premium patrons unlock perks unavailable to ordinary shoppers.
concepts.body: Elite patrons enjoy enhanced privileges across their account.

concepts.title: Extended Send-Back
concepts.description: Top patrons receive a longer grace period to send merchandise back.
concepts.body: The most valued buyers get extra weeks to send merchandise back.

note: loyalty tier governs the longer return window but the wording is a synonym swap with no shared tag (LLM headroom)
